name: Sweet Potato and Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10 oz each) Chicken broth, undiluted
1 tbsp Bick's hot pepper relish OR 1/4 tsp Tabasco sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pierce the sweet potatoes and bake them until very soft, about 45 minutes. Alternatively, microwave them on high for 10 minutes.
3. Peel the cooked potatoes and puree in a food processor.
4. Combine the mashed potatoes, chicken broth, water, and hot pepper relish in a large saucepan.
5. Add more water, if needed, until the soup reaches your desired thickness.
6. Cook over medium heat until hot.
7. Serve topped with a dollop of sour cream and additional hot pepper relish. Makes 6 cups.
